case_title: CAROLE DEMSKY VS. TOMMY LOUNG PHAM et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-02-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-23-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
BEFORE HEARING, PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-02-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-23-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION
